calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ann Mendoza.
Steven Shorr, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Assocition.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, and declaration of Laura Ferrel, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Capital Partnerships Inc., a California corporation and Davis R. Schwartz an individual as follows:
Damages $26,138.66
Interest $2,392.48
Attorney's Fees $1,838.31
Costs $398.45 for a total of $30,767.90
Judgment signed in open court.
